violations.text: coffee and ice were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed rinsed and cleaned hand sink at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by rolling garbage cans/buckets. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored throughout prep and storage areas. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be cleaned by end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
